2606.23313.title: Uncertainty-based Debiasing and Unlearning for Decontamination
2606.23313.paper_summary: Benchmark-based evaluation is the dominant paradigm for assessing large language model (LLM) capabilities, yet data contamination inflates reported performance and undermines fair comparison. Existing decontamination methods are evaluated solely through aggregate accuracy, which can obscure substantial differences in per-sample model behaviour, and many require access to an uncontaminated model. In this paper, we propose a sample-level evaluation framework for decontamination that complements accuracy-based assessment with distributional distance metrics, measuring how closely a decontaminated model recovers the output distribution of an uncontaminated model on each sample. Building on this framework, we introduce Uncertainty-Based Decontamination (UBD), a family of methods that leverage deep ensembles of the contaminated model to estimate per-sample memorization without requiring a uncontaminated model or knowledge of which samples are contaminated. UBD estimates a per-sample correction scalar from ensemble uncertainty, which is used to construct a debiased target distribution that suppresses the inflated probability mass on correct answers induced by contamination. This target is then used either as a post-hoc output correction (debiasing) or as a soft training signal for parameter update (unlearning). Experiments on MMLU-Pro and MATH-MCQA across multiple LLM backbones demonstrate that UBD produces per-sample output distributions substantially closer to those of an uncontaminated model than paraphrasing or choice-permutation baselines, while preserving model performance on uncontaminated data.
2606.23313.paper_summary_zh: 基準評估是評估大型語言模型（LLM）能力的主要範式，但數據污染會膨脹報告的性能並削弱公平比較。現有的去污染方法僅通過整體準確性進行評估，這可能會掩蓋每個樣本模型行為的實質差異，並且許多方法需要訪問未污染的模型。在本文中，我們提出了一種樣本級評估框架，用於去污染，該框架通過分佈距離度量來補充基於準確性的評估，測量去污染模型在每個樣本上恢復未污染模型的輸出分佈的接近程度。在此框架的基礎上，我們介紹了基於不確定性的去污染（UBD），這是一系列方法，利用受污染模型的深度集成來估計每個樣本的記憶，無需未污染模型或知道哪些樣本被污染。UBD從集成不確定性中估計每個樣本的修正標量，該標量用於構建一個去偏的目標分佈，以抑制由污染引起的正確答案的膨脹概率質量。然後，這個目標要麼用作事後輸出修正（去偏），要麼作為參數更新的軟訓練信號（去學習）。在多個LLM骨幹上對MMLU-Pro和MATH-MCQA的實驗表明，UBD產生的每個樣本輸出分佈與未污染模型的分佈相比，顯著更接近，而不論是針對改寫還是選擇排列的基準，同時保持模型在未污染數據上的性能。
2606.23313.author: Guangzhi Sun et.al.
2606.23313.authors: Guangzhi Sun, Xiao Zhan, Mark Gales
